Experience

12+ years building enterprise HR technology

From frontline support to global AI and service transformation programs.

GE HealthCare

Global Service Experience Lead

Jan 2024 - Present
  • Work on global HR service-enablement technology across ServiceNow HRSD, HR portals, chatbots, Agentic AI, automation platforms and Workday-connected service processes.
  • Drive ServiceNow HRSD readiness and Knowledge & AI content migration: batching, governance, SME validation, access readiness, risk tracking and go-live planning for a global HR transformation program.
  • Partner with product, HR operations, service delivery, technology and vendor teams to improve platform integrity, self-service usability and global policy alignment.
  • Build operational playbooks and enablement materials that standardize execution across shared service delivery centers.
  • Use service metrics, adoption signals and chatbot performance insights to reduce Tier 1 demand and improve employee experience.
  • Evaluate AI/ML, NLP and automation opportunities: chatbot expansion, knowledge quality, AI-assisted content review workflows.
ServiceNow HRSDAgentic AIWorkdayChatbotsPower BI

General Electric

Project Manager - HR Tools & Technologies

Sep 2020 - Dec 2023
  • Delivered chatbot and virtual-assistant platforms supporting global HR service strategy, policy compliance and self-service adoption.
  • Supported GE’s corporate separation into GE HealthCare, GE Aerospace and GE Vernova, aligning HR technology, service channels, chatbot capabilities and knowledge management to evolving business needs.
  • Reduced unresolved chatbot utterances by 84% through platform upgrades, content improvements and bot training enhancements.
  • Trained bots for annual enrollment use cases, reducing related inquiries by 74% and improving self-service effectiveness.
  • Led knowledge management, CMS optimization, feedback analysis and chatbot improvement cycles across regions.
  • Automated virtual-assistant testing to improve release quality, response accuracy and operational efficiency.
Chatbot PlatformsNLP EnginesCMS ToolsHR Portals

HCLTech

Manager

Oct 2013 - Sep 2020
  • Designed chatbot solutions integrated with enterprise HR and IT systems to improve self-service and reduce support volume.
  • Managed bot evolution cycles: requirement intake, stakeholder alignment, user feedback, testing, training and release coordination.
  • Enabled internal teams with chatbot operating practices, functional documentation and continuous-improvement routines.
Enterprise ChatbotsHR/IT Integrations

Dell International Services

Client Technical Support Associate

Feb 2013 - Sep 2013
  • Provided frontline hardware, software and network troubleshooting, resolving customer issues within service expectations.
